items.title: Anthropic’s Claude Tag is learning your company, one Slack message at a time
items.raw_content: Anthropic’s new Claude Tag brings an always-on AI teammate to Slack. But beyond productivity, the feature is a strategic play to capture organizational context, institutional knowledge, and enterprise workflows.

items.title: Something’s off with Midjourney’s pivot to body scanners
items.raw_content: Last week, Midjourney, an AI startup best known for its image generator, made an unusual pivot: medical imaging. items.title: Meta launches cheaper smart glasses without Ray-Ban
